heading: Construction of needs provisions
label: 1070d–40 Construction of needs provisions
text: Except as provided in , nothing in this subpart, or any other Act, shall be construed to permit the receipt of a scholarship under this subpart to be counted for any needs test in connection with the awarding of any grant or the making of any loan under this chapter or any other provision of Federal law relating to educational assistance.section 1087kk of this title
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 1070d–40, , as added , , , provided that receipt of scholarship under Robert C. Byrd Honors Scholarship Program not be counted for needs test for education grant or loan, prior to the general revision of this part by .Pub. L. 89–329, title IV, § 419JPub. L. 98–558, title VIII, § 801(a)98 Stat. 2902Pub. L. 99–498Oct. 30, 1984
Amendments1992— substituted “Except as provided in , nothing” for “Nothing”.Pub. L. 102–325section 1087kk of this title
